strengths: 15+ years of hands-on software engineering across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains, with direct experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq.

Proven track record of building and open-sourcing AI-adjacent platforms (GISCollective) and developer tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) that demonstrate deep technical craftsmanship and product fluency.

Demonstrated ability to lead cross-stack innovation — from embedded systems to cloud-native AI tooling — with entrepreneurial initiative evident in founding GISCollective and driving internal workshops and tooling.
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 raises questions about recent active engagement, though prior roles show sustained output.
No explicit mention of a Master’s or PhD in AI-related field, though practical AI product experience compensates for this.
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may limit direct customer engagement in Berlin-based roles requiring local language fluency.

key_factors.factor: Technical Breadth Across Cloud & AI Stack

response.justification: Bogdan’s 15+ years of engineering leadership, combined with direct contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source AI-adjacent platforms like GISCollective, align strongly with the role’s demand for builder fluency in AI and cloud technologies; his entrepreneurial initiative, technical craftsmanship, and consistent delivery of production-grade systems — from real-time microservices to developer tooling — demonstrate the strategic innovation and influence required at a director-level IC role, making him a compelling fit despite the career gap and lack of advanced AI degrees.
